items.description: Fried Chicken tossed with chilli sauce, tomato, capsicum, onion, and herbs

items.name: Sukuti Lamb/Buff
items.description: Smoked, dried lamb jerky fried and sautéed in tomato, onion, chilli, Himalayan style sauce

items.description: Handmade Nepalese dumplings (10 pcs) served with home-made tomato chutney.

items.description: Handmade Nepalese dumplings (10 pcs) served with home-made tomato chutney.

items.description: Handmade Nepalese dumplings (10 pcs) served with home-made tomato chutney.

items.description: Handmade Nepalese dumplings (10 pcs) served with home-made tomato chutney.

items.description: Handmade Nepalese dumplings (10 pcs) served with home-made tomato chutney.

items.description: Handmade Nepalese dumplings (10 pcs) served with home-made tomato chutney.

items.name: Daal Fried
items.description: Slow cooked overnight soaked lentil fried with onions, spices with a touch of ghee

items.name: Gundruk Bhatmas
items.description: Fermented green leafy vegetables cooked with deep fried soybean in Himalayan style gravy sauce

items.name: Rajma
items.description: Red kidney Beans cooked in tomatoes, onions and Nepalese spices in Himalayan style gravy sauce

items.name: Aloo Bhenta
items.description: Eggplant and potato curry cooked in Nepalese style spices and sauce

items.name: Aloo Bodi Tama
items.description: Traditional Nepalese curry prepared from pickled bamboo-shoots cooked with potatoes and black eyed peas

items.name: Palak Paneer
items.description: Spinach and cottage cheese in a thick curry sauce based on pureed spinach with garlic and cream

items.name: Kukhura ko Masu (Chicken Curry)
items.description: Succulent chunks of chicken prepared with onion, tomatoes, ginger, garlic and aromatic Nepalese spices

items.name: Prawn Curry
items.description: Marinated and deep fried Prawns cooked in aromatic Himalayan spiced gravy

items.name: Bheda ko Masu (Lamb Curry)
items.description: Tender meat cooked in Aromatic Nepalese spices, onion, tomatoes, ginger, garlic and herbs

items.name: Khasi ko Masu (Goat Curry)
items.description: Goat meat with bone sautéed and simmered with onion, tomatoes, ginger, garlic and fragrant spices

items.name: Newari Khaja Set
items.description: Served with beaten rice, chicken chhoila or buff chhoila, lamb sekuwa, aalu ko achar, bhatmas sadheko, bara (lentil pancake) eggs and salad (cold dish)

items.name: Nepali Khana ko Thali
items.description: Traditional "Daal-Bhaat-Tarkari" meal served with Steamed-rice (Bhaat), Lentil (Daal), Saag (Stir Fried Asian Greens) with a side of green salad, pappad, Nepalese Achar (Pickle), choice of meat curry (Goat/lamb/Chicken or Local chicken) and desert. (Vegetarian available)

items.name: Dhido ko Thali (Weekends only)
items.description: Traditional Nepalese style buckwheat pudding meal served with ghee on top of pudding (Dhido), Saag (Stir fried Asian Greens), green salad, yoghurt, timur pickle and choice of meat curry (Goat/Lamb/Chicken) with a rich gravy sauce.

items.name: Lal Mohan
items.description: Lal Mohan with plain yoghurt and a sprinkle of coconut

items.name: Rasgulla
items.description: Rasgulla with plain yoghurt cranberries and a sprinkle of pistachios

items.name: Roti
items.description: Soft buttery roti

items.name: Soda
items.description: Coke/Sprite/Fanta/Diet/Zero/Lemonade
